news.title: Natco Pharma launches a new drug in the US for multiple myeloma.
news.summary: Natco Pharma launches a new drug in the US for multiple myeloma.

news.title:
Natco Pharma launched generic Pomalidomide Capsules in the US for multiple myeloma and Kaposi sarcoma.
The drug had $3.2B US sales in 12 months, with 180 days shared exclusivity per FDA.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma launched generic Pomalidomide Capsules in the US for multiple myeloma and Kaposi sarcoma.
The drug had $3.2B US sales in 12 months, with 180 days shared exclusivity per FDA.

news.title:
Ashoka Buildcon, Natco Pharma, and Persistent Systems report OCF > ₹1,000 Cr, signaling strong core operations.
Ashoka Buildcon shows 2,219% QoQ profit growth; Persistent Systems records 23% YoY revenue rise in Q3FY26.
news.summary:
Ashoka Buildcon, Natco Pharma, and Persistent Systems report OCF > ₹1,000 Cr, signaling strong core operations.
Ashoka Buildcon shows 2,219% QoQ profit growth; Persistent Systems records 23% YoY revenue rise in Q3FY26.

news.title: Eris Lifesciences partners with Natco Pharma for weight loss drug semaglutide.
news.summary: Eris Lifesciences partners with Natco Pharma for weight loss drug semaglutide.

news.title: Natco Pharma's shares rise post approval for generic Ozempic, a major GLP-1 opportunity.
news.summary: Natco Pharma's shares rise post approval for generic Ozempic, a major GLP-1 opportunity.

news.title:
Natco Pharma surges 7% on CDSCO approval for Semaglutide.
IRB Infra falls 4% after weak Q3 results; NSE adv/decl ratio at 2:3.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma surges 7% on CDSCO approval for Semaglutide.
IRB Infra falls 4% after weak Q3 results; NSE adv/decl ratio at 2:3.

news.title:
Natco Pharma received CDSCO approval for generic Semaglutide, used for type 2 diabetes.
The launch is planned in India by March 2026 as an adjunct therapy for adults.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma received CDSCO approval for generic Semaglutide, used for type 2 diabetes.
The launch is planned in India by March 2026 as an adjunct therapy for adults.

news.title:
US FDA inspected Natco Pharma's API unit in Chennai, noting 7 observations in Form 483.
Inspection classified as Voluntary Action Indicated; EIR has been received.
news.summary:
US FDA inspected Natco Pharma's API unit in Chennai, noting 7 observations in Form 483.
Inspection classified as Voluntary Action Indicated; EIR has been received.

news.title:
Natco Pharma reports sharp quarterly decline with revenue, profit contraction.
Mojo Grade downgraded from Buy to Hold on Jan 12, 2026.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma reports sharp quarterly decline with revenue, profit contraction.
Mojo Grade downgraded from Buy to Hold on Jan 12, 2026.

news.title:
Natco Pharma announces management changes; CFO S.V.V.N. Appa Rao retires on Feb 12, 2026.
Mr. Amit Parekh appointed as CFO and Mr. Srinivas Rao as EVP Pharma Division effective Feb 13, 2026.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma announces management changes; CFO S.V.V.N. Appa Rao retires on Feb 12, 2026.
Mr. Amit Parekh appointed as CFO and Mr. Srinivas Rao as EVP Pharma Division effective Feb 13, 2026.

news.title:
Natco Pharma's Q3 EBITDA rises to 1.59B INR vs 388M YoY.
EBITDA margin improves notably to 24.5% from 8.2% YoY.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma's Q3 EBITDA rises to 1.59B INR vs 388M YoY.
EBITDA margin improves notably to 24.5% from 8.2% YoY.

news.title:
Natco Pharma declares a dividend of Rs 1.5 per share.
This reflects the company's commitment to returning value to shareholders.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma declares a dividend of Rs 1.5 per share.
This reflects the company's commitment to returning value to shareholders.

news.title:
Natco Pharma gets HC approval to manufacture Semaglutide for diabetes and obesity.
The company can export Semaglutide to multiple international markets.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma gets HC approval to manufacture Semaglutide for diabetes and obesity.
The company can export Semaglutide to multiple international markets.

news.title:
Natco Pharma received tentative US FDA approval for Erdafitinib tablets.
Erdafitinib, a Balversa generic, targets advanced urothelial carcinoma with $60M US sales.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma received tentative US FDA approval for Erdafitinib tablets.
Erdafitinib, a Balversa generic, targets advanced urothelial carcinoma with $60M US sales.

news.title:
Natco Pharma acquires 49% stake in PT Natco Lotus Farma, achieving 100% ownership.
The transaction was completed for IDR 14.1 billion (around ₹7.7 crores) in cash.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma acquires 49% stake in PT Natco Lotus Farma, achieving 100% ownership.
The transaction was completed for IDR 14.1 billion (around ₹7.7 crores) in cash.

news.title:
Natco Pharma's board meeting on 12th Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY25-26 results.
Board to consider 3rd interim dividend; trading window closed 29th Jan-14th Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma's board meeting on 12th Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY25-26 results.
Board to consider 3rd interim dividend; trading window closed 29th Jan-14th Feb 2026.

news.title:
Pharma firms expect 8-11% revenue growth in Q3FY26 driven by strong domestic sales.
Generic Revlimid sales decline in the US; PAT growth forecasted at 2-4% for the quarter.
news.summary:
Pharma firms expect 8-11% revenue growth in Q3FY26 driven by strong domestic sales.
Generic Revlimid sales decline in the US; PAT growth forecasted at 2-4% for the quarter.

news.title:
Natco Pharma filed a plea to revoke Novo Nordisk's Semaglutide patent.
High Court notice could influence generic availability for diabetes medication.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma filed a plea to revoke Novo Nordisk's Semaglutide patent.
High Court notice could influence generic availability for diabetes medication.

news.title:
Natco Pharma appoints Amit Parekh as EVP-Finance & Accounts from Dec 2, 2025.
Parekh to succeed CFO S.V.V.N. Appa Rao in Feb 2026; has 20+ years experience in finance.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma appoints Amit Parekh as EVP-Finance & Accounts from Dec 2, 2025.
Parekh to succeed CFO S.V.V.N. Appa Rao in Feb 2026; has 20+ years experience in finance.

news.title:
Natco Pharma's credit ratings reaffirmed by ICRA: ICRA AA (Stable) for long-term and ICRA A1 for short-term instruments.
Ratings supported by strong financial profile, robust R&D, and market position; gRevlimid patent expiry may impact future margins and revenues.
news.summary:
Natco Pharma's credit ratings reaffirmed by ICRA: ICRA AA (Stable) for long-term and ICRA A1 for short-term instruments.
Ratings supported by strong financial profile, robust R&D, and market position; gRevlimid patent expiry may impact future margins and revenues.
